name: Ragged Umbrella
descs:
[Effects apply only to #1, #2 Deployed Identities]

When winning a Clash using a Skill that inflicts [Burst] Potency or Count, inflict +2 [Burst] Count against the target (once per turn per Identity)

If the target doesn't have [Burst], inflict 3 [Burst] Potency and +2 [Burst] Count instead.

[Effects apply only to #1, #2, and #3 Deployed Identities]

When winning a Clash using a Skill that inflicts [Burst] Potency or Count, inflict 2 [Burst] Potency and +2 [Burst] Count against the target (once per turn per Identity)

If the target doesn't have [Burst], inflict 4 [Burst] Potency and +2 [Burst] Count instead.

[Effects apply only to #1, #2, and #3 Deployed Identities]

When winning a Clash using a Skill that inflicts [Burst] Potency or Count, inflict 4 [Burst] Potency and +2 [Burst] Count against the target (once per turn per Identity)

If the target doesn't have [Burst], inflict 6 [Burst] Potency and +3 [Burst] Count instead.
